spec.name: A Side Street
spec.description: This small side street leads south away from the temple into the business section of town. The destruction that leveled this city was not biased; these important looking buildings have been almost totally destroyed. There is a hole in the wall of a very large structure to the east.

north.description: A small garden path encircles the temple.

east.description: This possibly could be the city hall.

west.description: Inside the building you see long pieces of metal, an oven, and some anvils.
